headline: Wabtec posts higher quarterly sales and earnings
summary: Wabtec reported a rise in first-quarter earnings, fueled by robust sales growth in both its freight and transit divisions compared to the previous year. The post Wabtec posts higher quarterly sales and earnings appeared first on FreightWaves.
